name: pretinnov-plugins
description: Production-grade Claude Code plugins: verification loops, self-learning intelligence, plugin creation from prompts, semantic codebase search, and unified code review.

plugins.name: clamper
plugins.description: Verification loop, deep project DNA extraction, and one-command ecosystem initialization. Clip it, Clamp it.

plugins.name: cortex
plugins.description: Self-learning intelligence layer that captures learnings, patterns, and decisions across sessions and injects them back automatically.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Meta-plugin that creates production-grade Claude Code plugins through a 4-phase pipeline: internet research, clarifying questions, architecture blueprint, and full code generation.

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: 9-category unified intelligence plugin: code review, AI dev toolkit, browser testing, workflow memory, frontend design, documentation, infrastructure, DX tools, and output styles. 24 agents, 12 skills, 7 hook events.

plugins.name: codebase-radar
plugins.description: Hybrid semantic + BM25 codebase search via LanceDB. Auto-indexes on session start, stays current as files change. Reduces token burn 40-60% on exploration-heavy sessions.
